title: holboellia obovata
intro: Holboellia obovata, also known as the Chinese or Chinese climbing milk vine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lardizabalaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. The health benefits of Holboellia obovata include its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Holboellia obovata is often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use.
